caption: A person's hands are seen opening a "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" Topps trading card box. The box is dark blue with white and red text, including the year "2020". The person is wearing a short-sleeved shirt. In the background, a smaller picture-in-picture window shows a person wearing a black shirt and a baseball cap sitting at a desk. The lower portion of the screen features a large red and white logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS". As the sequence progresses, the person's hands carefully lift the top flap of the box to reveal the contents inside. The box is positioned on a flat surface against a white backdrop. The overall scene focuses on the process of unboxing the collectible items, with the "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" branding remaining constant across the bottom of the frame.
